operations.description: Claim or transfer ownership. If owner is null, signer (user-signed actions) can only set their own address; system-signed actions may set any address (used for backfill). If owner is already set, current owner must sign and may pass any new address.

errors.description: The action signer is not the current owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

errors.description: A user-signed claim of an unowned environment must set the signer's own address as owner
errors.name: SelfClaimRequiredError

operations.name: SET_OWNER

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_LABEL

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_GENERIC_SUBDOMAIN

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_CUSTOM_DOMAIN

operations.description: Set the default package registry URL for this environment

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_DEFAULT_PACKAGE_REGISTRY
operations.reducer: state.defaultPackageRegistry = action.input.defaultPackageRegistry;

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_DNS_RECORDS

operations.description: Pin one enabled service to the apex of the customDomain — the service is served at customDomain.domain instead of <prefix>.<customDomain>. Pass a null type to clear apex routing.

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

errors.description: Cannot pin a disabled service to the apex — enable the service first
errors.name: ServiceNotEnabledError

operations.name: SET_APEX_SERVICE

operations.description: Subscribe the environment to a release channel (DEV, STAGING, LATEST) so new image releases on that channel auto-bump the enabled services' versions. Pass null to opt out.

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

operations.name: SET_AUTO_UPDATE_CHANNEL
operations.reducer: state.autoUpdateChannel = action.input.channel ?? null;

operations.name: SET_RUNTIME_CONFIG
operations.description: Set or clear the Connect runtime config for this environment — the operator-editable subset of powerhouse.config.json (the connect.* block and the top-level packageRegistryUrl). A null or empty-object input clears all overrides (falls back to bundled defaults). Rendered into the tenant's PH_CONNECT_CONFIG_JSON via the vetra-cloud-environment processor on CHANGES_APPROVED.
operations.reducer: state.runtimeConfig = action.input.config ?? null;

errors.name: NotOwnerError
errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment

errors.name: InvalidRuntimeConfigError
errors.description: The provided runtime config failed validation against the bundled powerhouse.config.json schema (connect.* subtree and/or packageRegistryUrl)

operations.description: Enable a service. For type=CLINT, clintConfig is required and is stored on the service's config field; for other types, clintConfig is ignored if provided.

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

errors.description: Enabling a CLINT service requires clintConfig to be provided
errors.name: ClintConfigRequiredError

errors.description: The given prefix is already used by a different service in this environment
errors.name: PrefixInUseError

operations.name: ENABLE_SERVICE

operations.description: Update the CLINT config (package, env vars, serviceCommand, resource size, enabled endpoints) for an existing CLINT service identified by prefix.

errors.description: No service exists with the given prefix
errors.name: ServiceNotFoundError

errors.description: SET_SERVICE_CONFIG only applies to CLINT services
errors.name: NotClintServiceError

operations.name: SET_SERVICE_CONFIG

errors.description: The action signer is not the owner of this environment
errors.name: NotOwnerError

global.initialValue:
{
  "owner": null,
  "label": null,
  "genericSubdomain": null,
  "genericBaseDomain": null,
  "customDomain": {
    "enabled": false,
    "domain": null,
    "dnsRecords": []
  },
  "defaultPackageRegistry": null,
  "services": [],
  "packages": [],
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "apexService": null,
  "autoUpdateChannel": null,
  "runtimeConfig": null
}
global.schema:
type VetraCloudEnvironmentState {
  owner: EthereumAddress
  label: String
  genericSubdomain: String
  genericBaseDomain: String
  customDomain: VetraCustomDomain
  defaultPackageRegistry: URL
  services: [VetraCloudEnvironmentService!]!
  packages: [VetraCloudPackage!]!
  status: VetraCloudEnvironmentStatus!
  apexService: VetraCloudEnvironmentServiceType
  autoUpdateChannel: AutoUpdateChannel
  runtimeConfig: String
}

enum AutoUpdateChannel {
  DEV
  STAGING
  LATEST
}

type VetraCustomDomain {
  enabled: Boolean!
  domain: String
  dnsRecords: [DnsRecord!]!
}

type DnsRecord {
  type: String!
  host: String!
  value: String!
}

type VetraCloudEnvironmentService {
  type: VetraCloudEnvironmentServiceType!
  prefix: String!
  enabled: Boolean!
  url: String
  status: ServiceStatus!
  version: String
  config: VetraCloudServiceClint
  selectedRessource: VetraCloudRessourceSize
}

type VetraCloudServiceClint {
  package: VetraCloudPackage!
  env: [VetraCloudServiceEnv!]!
  serviceCommand: String
  selectedRessource: VetraCloudRessourceSize
}

type VetraCloudServiceEnv {
  name: String!
  value: String
  isSecret: Boolean
}

enum VetraCloudRessourceSize {
  VETRA_AGENT_S
  VETRA_AGENT_M
  VETRA_AGENT_L
  VETRA_AGENT_XL
  VETRA_AGENT_XXL
}

enum VetraCloudEnvironmentServiceType {
  CONNECT
  SWITCHBOARD
  FUSION
  CLINT
}

enum ServiceStatus {
  ACTIVE
  SUSPENDED
  PROVISIONING
  BILLING_ISSUE
}

enum VetraCloudEnvironmentStatus {
  DRAFT
  CHANGES_PENDING
  CHANGES_APPROVED
  CHANGES_PUSHED
  DEPLOYING
  DEPLOYMENt_FAILED
  READY
  TERMINATING
  DESTROYED
  ARCHIVED
  STOPPED
}

type VetraCloudPackage {
  registry: URL!
  name: String!
  version: String
}
